title: bossiaea linophylla
intro: Bossiaea linophylla, commonly known as the 'Cape Range Pea', is a species of flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Australian Aboriginal medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Bossiaea linophylla include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various skin conditions and infections. Bossiaea linophylla can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas and infusions, and is also used in traditional Aboriginal bush medicine preparations.
